title: SOP for cDNA synthesis by RT (Reverse Transcription)  Promega kit
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eqdiq","text":"SOP for cDNA synthesis by RT (Reverse Transcription)  Promega kit","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare per sample: A B 1 total RNA (1 pg-1ug) �max vol 4ul 2 Water Fill upti 4ul 3 OligodT 1ul 4 Final Volume 5ul
Heat samples at 70°C for 5 min (prepare mix for step 4).
Snap freeze samples at +4°C or on ice for a minimum of 5 min.

Prepare RT mix (vol per samples, calculate for all your samples + 1): A B 1 RT buffer (5X) 4ul 2 MgCl2 (25 mM) 3ul 3 dNTP Mix (10 mM) 1 ul 4 Rnasine* 0.5 ul 5 Rtase* 1 ul 6 Water 5.5ul 7 final volume 15 ul * add them in the last step before adding the mix to each sample. Meanwhile keep them at 20°C.
RT program A B 1 hybridization 5 min at 25°C 2 elongation 60 min at 42°C 3 inactivation of the enzyme 15 min at 70°C
Add H2O to bring final concentration to a desired amount – this will likely depend on the abundance of your targets.
Once it is done, cDNA can be stored at -20°C
Take from the kit: OligodT, RT buffer (5x), MgCl2, dNTP mix, and H 2 O to thaw- you can keep them on ice or at RT for a little while.
creator: Senthilkumar Karuppagounder
